properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 C5 V6 C5 V7

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I just want to speak the name of Jesus Over every heart and every mind 'Cause I know there is peace within your presence I speak Jesus

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I just want to speak the name of Jesus Till every dark addiction starts to break Declaring there is hope and there is freedom I speak Jesus

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: 'Cause your name is power Your name is healing Your name is life Break every stronghold Shine through the shadows Burn like a fire

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I just want to speak the name of Jesus Over fear and all anxiety To every soul held captive by depression I speak Jesus

verse.name: C5
verse.lines: Your name is power Your name is healing Your name is life Break every stronghold Shine through the shadows Burn like a fire

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Shout Jesus from the mountains, Jesus in the streets Jesus in the darkness over every enemy Jesus for my family I speak the holy Name, Jesus

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: I just want to speak the name of Jesus Over every heart and every mind 'Cause I know there is peace within His presence I speak Jesus
